emails.subject: Internal Guest Access to EnronOnline
emails.body: Internal Guest Access to EnronOnline Vince, Following is an internal guest ID and password which will allow you view only access to EnronOnline. Please note, the user ID and password are CASE SENSITIVE. User ID: EOL59545 Password: WELCOME! If you have any difficulties logging in, please contact the EnronOnline HelpDesk at 713-853-HELP (4357) with any questions.
